description: The AI monitors queue health, campaign triggers, and staffing signals overnight — surfacing contact center risks before your 9 AM sync. Correlates Dynamics 365, Marketing Cloud, HR, and IT data that Dynamics 365 alone cannot connect.
Ask a plain-language question and receive a sourced answer drawn simultaneously from Dynamics 365 Contact Center, Marketing Cloud, HR Workforce Management, and the legacy Genesys migration bridge.
The AI identifies where processes break down — like the advance-notice gap between Marketing and Contact Center that caused today's auto loan spike — and maps the root cause across systems.
From the same conversation, reroute agents in Dynamics 365, enable callback queuing, draft Marketing notification rules, and send overtime offers — all without leaving the AI interface.
